name: aspell-en
title: aspell-en
description:
English dictionary for GNU Aspell
This package contains all the required files to add support for English
language to the GNU Aspell spell checker.
.
American, British, Canadian and Australian spellings are included.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use aspell-en because English dictionary for GNU Aspell.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use aspell-en as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair aspell-en with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `aspell-en --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
